question_en: What is the Agniveer scheme? What happens after 4 years?
question_hi_hinglish: Agniveer scheme kya hai? 4 saal ke baad bacche ka kya hoga?
answer_en: Agniveers serve in the Army, Navy, or Air Force for 4 years. After this, 25% are kept permanently. The rest receive a 'Seva Nidhi' package of approx ₹12 Lakhs and get priority in State Police and CAPF jobs. It’s a great way to gain discipline and capital at a young age.
answer_hi_hinglish: Agniveer mein baccha 4 saal ke liye Army, Navy ya Air Force mein seva deta hai. Iske baad 25% ko permanent rakha jata hai. Baaki logon ko ₹12 Lakh ka 'Seva Nidhi' package milta hai aur State Police ki bharti mein preference di jati hai. Kam umar mein discipline aur paisa kamane ka ye accha mauka hai.

question_en: How can my child join the Chhattisgarh State Police as an SI?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha Chhattisgarh Police mein SI (Sub-Inspector) kaise ban sakta hai?
answer_en: To become an SI, a candidate needs a graduation degree and must clear the CG Police recruitment exam, which includes a physical test and a written exam. It is a highly respected role with the power to serve the local community directly in our state.
answer_hi_hinglish: SI banne ke liye graduation zaroori hai. Iske baad CG Police ka recruitment exam dena hota hai, jisme physical test aur written exam dono hote hain. Hamare state mein ye ek bahut hi sammanit aur power wali post hai.

question_en: Is a Bank PO job better than a Clerk job? What is the growth?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Bank PO ki naukri Clerk se behtar hai? Isme aage badhne ke kya mauke hain?
answer_en: Bank PO (Probationary Officer) is a management-level entry with a higher salary and faster promotions. A Clerk handles daily transactions. Both are stable government-linked jobs, but PO leads to becoming a Branch Manager much faster. Both require clearing IBPS or SBI exams.
answer_hi_hinglish: Bank PO ek officer level ki post hai jisme salary aur promotion dono clerk se zyada hote hain. Clerk ka kaam rozana ke len-den ka hota hai. Dono hi stable naukriyan hain, par PO banne par baccha jaldi Branch Manager ban sakta hai. Iske liye IBPS ya SBI ke exams dene hote hain.

question_en: How to get a job in Indian Railways (RRB)? Are there technical roles?
question_hi_hinglish: Railways (RRB) mein naukri kaise milti hai? Kya isme technical kaam bhi hota hai?
answer_en: Railways hires through RRB exams for various posts like Station Master, Guard, and Junior Engineers. For technical students (ITI/Diploma), there are specialized roles in engine maintenance and signaling. It is one of India's biggest employers with excellent family benefits.
answer_hi_hinglish: Railways mein RRB exams ke zariye Station Master, Guard aur Engineers ki bharti hoti hai. Technical baccho (ITI/Diploma) ke liye engine aur signaling mein alag se mauke hote hain. Railways mein naukri ka matlab hai poore parivaar ke liye behtareen suvidhayen aur lifetime stability.

question_en: Why should my child learn EV (Electric Vehicle) mechanics instead of regular motor mechanics?
question_hi_hinglish: Mere bacche ko normal mechanic ke badle EV (Electric Vehicle) ka kaam kyun seekhna chahiye?
answer_en: By 2026, most new cars and scooters are electric. Regular mechanics don't know how to fix batteries and motors. An EV specialist is a high-tech mechanic who earns much more because the technology is new and experts are few. It’s the future of the automobile industry.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 tak zyada tar nayi gaadiyan aur scooters electric ho rahe hain. Normal mechanic ko battery aur electric motor ka kaam nahi aata. EV specialist ki demand bahut zyada hai aur wo normal mechanic se kahin zyada kama sakta hai kyunki ye nayi technology hai.

question_en: What is the scope of Solar Panel Technicians in rural areas?
question_hi_hinglish: Gaon ke ilakon mein Solar Panel Technicians ka kya scope hai?
answer_en: With government schemes like 'PM Surya Ghar,' almost every rooftop will have solar panels. Technicians who can install and repair these are needed in every village and town. It’s a great self-employment opportunity for students who do a short vocational course.
answer_hi_hinglish: Sarkar ki 'PM Surya Ghar' jaise schemes ki wajah se ab har chhat par solar panel lag rahe hain. Inhe lagane aur repair karne walo ki zaroorat har gaon-sheher mein hai. Chhota sa course karke baccha khud ka business bhi shuru kar sakta hai.

question_en: Can learning a language like German or French get my child a high-paying job?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya German ya French seekhne se bacche ko badi salary wali naukri mil sakti hai?
answer_en: Yes! In 2026, many MNCs look for language experts for translation and international sales. Sitting in India, a language specialist can earn ₹50k-₹1 Lakh per month working for global companies. It's an excellent skill for students who want an office job with a global touch.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan! 2026 mein badi companies ko translation aur videshi business ke liye language experts chahiye hote hain. India mein baithkar hi German ya French specialist ₹50k-₹1 Lakh mahina kama sakte hain. Global company mein office job pane ka ye ek behtareen rasta hai.

question_en: What are 'Soft Skills'? Why are they important for job interviews?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Soft Skills' kya hoti hain? Interview ke liye ye kyun zaroori hain?
answer_en: Soft skills are about how you speak, behave, and lead. Many students have good marks but fail interviews because they can't express themselves. Learning soft skills makes a student confident, helping them clear interviews in big companies and move into leadership roles faster.
answer_hi_hinglish: Soft skills ka matlab hai aapka baat karne ka tarika, vyavahar aur leadership. Kai baar acche marks hone ke baad bhi bacche interview mein fail ho jate hain kyunki wo apni baat thik se keh nahi paate. Soft skills seekhne se baccha confident banta hai aur badi companies mein jaldi select hota hai.
